message:
Ignore non-POLLIN poll events in input activity detection

poll() returns > 0 for POLLHUP/POLLERR/POLLNVAL, not just POLLIN.
The old code treated any poll wakeup as user activity, which could
cause false idle-exit if a device disconnects or errors.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>
